blockers.title: Writing conciseness remains below threshold
blockers.description: Recent writing evidence shows extra detail that weakens GP-focused communication.

blockers.title: Speaking fluency markers still appear
blockers.description: Filler words and soft starts reduce handover authority.

todaysTasks.title: Writing: Discharge Summary Practice
todaysTasks.rationale: Your Conciseness & Clarity score was below target. This task narrows the detail to what the GP needs.

todaysTasks.title: Speaking: Patient Handover Role Play
todaysTasks.rationale: Fluency markers were flagged in your last speaking attempt. This role play reinforces structure and confident delivery.

weakCriteria.explanation: Strong on the main idea, less secure on precise frequency.

nextMockRecommendation.title: Full OET Mock Test
nextMockRecommendation.rationale: A full mock will confirm whether Writing gains are transferring under pressure.
